nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly cloudy. Low around 30, with temperatures rising to around 33 overnight. East wind 5 to 10 mph, with gusts as high as 21 mph.

nws.name: Sunday
nws.detailedForecast: Sunny, with a high near 64. Northeast wind 3 to 9 mph.

nws.name: Sunday Night
nws.shortForecast: Mostly Cloudy then Slight Chance Rain And Snow
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain between 1am and 4am, then a slight chance of rain and snow between 4am and 5am. Mostly cloudy. Low around 32, with temperatures rising to around 36 overnight. Northeast wind around 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

nws.name: Monday
nws.detailedForecast: Partly sunny, with a high near 56. Northeast wind around 12 mph, with gusts as high as 18 mph.

nws.name: Monday Night
nws.shortForecast: Light Rain Likely then Slight Chance Light Snow
nws.detailedForecast: Rain likely between 7pm and 4am, then a slight chance of snow. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 26. North wind around 14 mph, with gusts as high as 23 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%.

nws.name: Tuesday
nws.shortForecast: Slight Chance Light Snow then Mostly Sunny
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of snow before 7am. Mostly sunny, with a high near 37. Northwest wind 14 to 17 mph, with gusts as high as 26 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

nws.name: Tuesday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly clear, with a low around 19. Northeast wind 6 to 13 mph, with gusts as high as 18 mph.

nws.name: Wednesday

nws.name: Thursday
